action.reasoning: Observation: best official eval is nav_seek_success=0.56 with the current latched planner/direct heuristic; the agent_1-control diagnostic did not show a clear improvement over the oracle+freeze strategy, with base_forward failing and base_spos_fast only 1/3 locally. Analysis: changing to pre-latch humanoid base control is risky. Remaining gains likely come from tuning existing latch/controller parameters, but first I need the exact current implementation and any complete diagnostic JSON/logs to avoid overwriting the best checkpoint. Decision: inspect current model.py/predict.py plus the saved agent1 diagnostic summary and prior sweep results compactly, then make one targeted parameter change or resubmit best.
